headline: Fitbit’s Charge 6 and Ace LTE are now as cheap as the new $100 Air
summary: Fitbit Charge 6 is $50 off at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target. Fitbit Ace LTE is $80 off its original price. These deals are perfect for Father's Day or summer entertainment.

headline: Apple wants Europe to blink
summary: Apple's new AI-powered Siri will not launch in Europe, blaming EU regulations. Millions of iPhone users in Europe will miss out on the AI features. Apple's AI was recently shown to be useful and capable.

headline: Anthropic releases its first Mythos-class model Claude Fable
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, its most powerful AI model made widely available. Fable 5 shows exceptional performance in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision. Its lead over other models grows as tasks become longer and more complex.

headline: SwitchBot’s E Ink Weather Station is already 20 percent off
summary: The SwitchBot Smart E Ink Weather Station is already discounted by 20 percent. Save $25, bringing the price down to $85. Purchase with an Amazon on-page coupon or code APAP23 on the SwitchBot site.

headline: Save $1,000 Off an Open Box Asus ROG Flow Z13 Ultra-Portable Gaming Laptop at Best Buy
summary: Get $1,000 off an open-box Asus ROG Flow Z13 ultra-portable gaming laptop. This tiny 2.65lb convertible boasts 64GB of RAM. It's more powerful than many full-sized gaming laptops.

headline: Today’s Best Deals: 8BitDo Retro R8 Gaming Mouse, Tales of Graces f Remastered, LEGO Pyramid of Giza
summary: Discover today's best deals, including the 8BitDo Retro R8 Gaming Mouse. Find discounts on Tales of Graces f Remastered. Don't miss the last chance for PlayStation’s Days of Play Sale.

headline: Secretlab Atlas Premium Review
summary: A review of the new Secretlab Atlas Premium gaming chair. The chair aims to blend productivity and gaming comfort seamlessly. It's dubbed as the 'gaming chair all grown up'.

headline: Grab an Alienware Aurora RTX 5080 Gaming PC With 64GB of RAM for $2,575 Before It Goes Out of Stock
summary: Purchase an Alienware Aurora RTX 5080 Gaming PC with 64GB of RAM for $2,575. This deal is available from Dell Outlet. Dell Outlet PCs include the same 1-year warranty as new models.

headline: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
summary: Trump claims Iran shot down a US Apache helicopter, vowing a response. Two crew members were rescued by an American sea drone. The incident signals heightened tensions between the US and Iran.

headline: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
summary: David Sullivan has been banned from contact with West Ham's women's and youth teams since 2023. The ban followed a safeguarding investigation by the Football Association. The nature of the investigation has not been disclosed.

headline: Men jailed for violence at Henry Nowak police protest
summary: Men have been jailed for violence that erupted at a police protest in Southampton. Disorder broke out near where 18-year-old student Henry Nowak was murdered. The protest was linked to the student's killing.

headline: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
summary: Israeli air strikes targeted the Lebanese city of Tyre. This occurred despite Iran's warning to Israel to cease attacks on its ally Hezbollah. Iran had threatened renewed hostilities if the attacks continued.
